mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement - Where every customer is treated like royalty!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this - I walk into my favorite coffee shop, and what do I see? A line. A LINE! Can you imagine the audacity of ordinary people thinking they can just waltz in and delay my daily caffeine fix? Outrageous. But fear not, dear listener, for Hot Josh does not wait in lines. I marched right up to the front, flashed my Bank of Entitlement card, and demanded to be served immediately. The nerve of the other customers to gasp in disbelief! But when the barista saw the sheer entitlement radiating from me, she didn't hesitate to brew my coffee with extra care, as if she knew I deserved it more than anyone else in that peasant-filled establishment. And as I sipped on my latte, basking in the envy of the common folk, I couldn't help but feel a warm sense of satisfaction. After all, when you're a client of the Bank of Entitlement, the world truly does revolve around you.
